title: strychnos densiflora
intro: Strychnos densiflora, also known as the West African strychnine tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, particularly in the tropical regions of West Africa. The medicinal properties of Strychnos densiflora lie in its seeds, which contain compounds that have been used to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to reduce swelling, fight infections, and promote wound healing. Strychnos densiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various ailments.
